title: phacelia cicutaria subsp. hispida
intro: Phacelia cicutaria subsp. hispida, also known as hispid phacelia, is a flowering plant species native to the southwestern United States and northwestern Mexico. This plant is known for its medicinal properties, particularly its antispasmodic, anti-inflammatory, and antiseptic effects, which make it useful in treating various health conditions. The health benefits of hispid phacelia include its ability to soothe digestive issues, reduce pain and inflammation, and support the respiratory system. Hispid phacelia can be prepared as a tea, infusion, or tincture, and it is often combined with other herbs to enhance its medicinal properties.
